title: Property Consultant - Salarpuria Sattva - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Salarpuria Sattva - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!
